title: XanaNode Studio Package Manifest
summary: package.json is preserved as a raw Studio source artifact in the XanaNode Studio substrate.
content:
{
  "name": "@xananode/studio",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Local-first desktop studio for authoring XanaNode knowledge substrates.",
  "type": "module",
  "main": "src/main/main.js",
  "scripts": {
    "build:metadata": "node scripts/write-build-metadata.mjs",
    "build:substrate-source": "node tools/build-substrate-source.mjs",
    "predev": "npm run build:metadata",
    "dev": "node scripts/dev.mjs",
    "prestart": "npm run build",
    "start": "electron .",
    "prebuild": "npm run build:metadata",
    "build": "vite build",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "test": "node --test test/*.test.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "latest",
    "vite": "latest",
    "typescript": "latest",
    "react": "latest",
    "react-dom": "latest",
    "electron": "latest",
    "concurrently": "latest",
    "wait-on": "latest",
    "cross-env": "latest",
    "@xananode/workspace": "file:./vendor/xananode-workspace-repo"
  },
  "devDependencies": {},
  "keywords": ["xananode", "studio", "knowledge-substrate", "local-first", "electron"],
  "license": "Apache-2.0"
}
